# After remove 65 (slide 106): g underflows; right sibling h can lend, so 70
# moves down from parent c into g and 75 (smallest of h) moves up into c.
#
#                       [50]
#                     /      \
#                 [30]        [60,75]
#                /    \      /   |    \
#            [10]   [40]  [55]  [70]  [80]
root 1
1  1  2  50 3
2  1  4  30 5
3  2  6  60 7  75 8
4  1  0  10 0
5  1  0  40 0
6  1  0  55 0
7  1  0  70 0
8  1  0  80 0
